creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Hello,

Your example is put in reversed.

As you might be aware, the i386 platform has a 4gb limitation because of 32bit mode. So I think you are hitting
this with ZFS as well. Is the machine capable of running AMD64 mode? Then it should just work fine (if the rest
of the hardware is sufficient ofcourse).

I also believe this PR cannot be resolved, since the mentioned 32bit addressing limit prevents anything like
this.

--
